---
title: "Sage Business Cases"
page-layout: article
---

# Sage Business Cases

## Description

Collection of business case studies from global publishers and universities. Supports classroom teaching and research in management, entrepreneurship, healthcare, and social enterprise.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Health & Medicine, Business & Economics, Social Sciences
- **Data/resource type:** Health & Biomedical Data
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Health & Biomedical Data

## Access notes

Sage Business Cases are licensed for all Yale affiliates and can be used for classroom teaching.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://sk.sagepub.com/cases)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
